section_name: Duty to Provide Evidence of Financial Responsibility to Investigating Officer
text: A person to whom this subchapter applies shall provide evidence of financial responsibility to a law enforcement officer of this state or a political subdivision of this state who is conducting an investigation of the collision.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.292 — Duty to Provide Evidence of Financial Responsibility to Investigating Officer

A person to whom this subchapter applies shall provide evidence of financial responsibility to a law enforcement officer of this state or a political subdivision of this state who is conducting an investigation of the collision.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 87, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.text: A person to whom this subchapter applies shall provide evidence of financial responsibility to a law enforcement officer of this state or a political subdivision of this state who is conducting an investigation of the collision.
